nodes.title: City Council Regular Meeting - March 2026

body.processed:
Regular meeting of the Maplewood City Council. The agenda includes the FY2027 budget discussion, updates on the Main Street revitalization project, and a public hearing on proposed zoning changes in the downtown district.

Agenda Highlights

  • Approval of previous meeting minutes
  • FY2027 budget first reading
  • Main Street project update presentation
  • Public hearing: Downtown zoning amendment
  • Resolution on park improvement bonds
  • Public comment period

nodes.location: City Hall Council Chambers, 200 Main Street

nodes.title: Planning Commission Meeting - April 2026

body.processed:
The Planning Commission will review several development proposals, including a mixed-use project on Commerce Boulevard and a residential subdivision in the Northfield area. Public input is encouraged on all agenda items.

Items for Review

  • Site plan review: Commerce Boulevard mixed-use development
  • Preliminary plat: Northfield Estates subdivision
  • Variance request: 450 Oak Street setback modification
  • Comprehensive plan amendment discussion
body.summary: The Planning Commission will review several development proposals, including a mixed-use project on Commerce Boulevard and a residential subdivision in the Northfield area. Public input is encouraged

nodes.location: City Hall Conference Room A, 200 Main Street

body.processed:
Join Mayor Chen and city staff for a community town hall meeting to discuss priorities for the upcoming year. Topics include infrastructure improvements, public safety initiatives, and the new city parks master plan. Light refreshments will be provided.

Discussion Topics

  • Infrastructure investment priorities
  • Community policing initiatives
  • Parks master plan overview
  • Open question and answer session
